name: Skill Package Reader
description: Read an existing TooGraph Skill package into structured state for review, improvement, or migration workflows.
llmInstruction: You are bound to the Skill Package Reader. Choose exactly one target skill key from the graph state or user request, and optionally choose source_scope as user or official. This skill is read-only: do not propose writes, patches, execution, deletion, or approval decisions. Return only skill_key and source_scope.

stateInputSchema.name: Target Skill Key
stateInputSchema.description: Existing Skill key to read. Optional when the LLM can infer the key from the request.

llmOutputSchema.name: Source Scope
llmOutputSchema.description: Optional source scope: user or official. Leave empty to prefer user then official.

stateOutputSchema.name: Success
stateOutputSchema.description: Whether a Skill package was found and read.

stateOutputSchema.name: Skill Package
stateOutputSchema.description: Structured Skill package metadata and UTF-8 file contents.

stateOutputSchema.name: Result
stateOutputSchema.description: Short read summary or validation error.
